name: Canned Birdie Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 unbaked deep dish pastry shell (9 inch)
1 cup shredded Swiss or Monterey Jack cheese
10 oz. chopped spinach, cooked and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Pierce the pastry shell thoroughly with a fork.
2. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together eggs, milk, mayonnaise, and seasonings until smooth.
4. In a separate bowl, chop well together chicken, cheese, spinach, and onion.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes, or until browned.
6. Cool for at least 30 minutes before cutting.
7. Serve with muffins, fruit, and a green salad.
